zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Cornwall於大約1354年出生在英國米德萊可時，她的父親John Cornwall31歲，母親Elizabeth26歲。她和Henry Frowyk至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1416年7月4日之前在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Cornwall于大约1354年出生在英国米德萊可时，她的父亲John Cornwall31岁，母亲Elizabeth26岁。她和Henry Frowyk至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1416年7月4日之前在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornwell
meanings: habitational name from Cornwell in Oxfordshire, named from Old English corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

variant of Cornwall or Cornhill; in southeastern England mainly a habitational name from Cornhill in London but elsewhere alternatively from Cornhill (Northumberland) or one of the many minor places so called, often becoming Cornell .

variants.name: Corney
meanings: habitational name from Corney in Cumbria or Corney in Hertfordshire (now known as Corneybury), from Old English corn ‘grain’ or corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + ēg ‘island’. It seems possible, from the distribution of early forms, that it may also derive from a lost place in Lancashire. Alternatively, a habitational name from Corney (Lancashire), later named Corneyrow, now Corner Row or Cornoe in Greenhalgh (alias Greenall), in the parish of Kirkham. Corney was sometimes pronounced and spelled Cornah, Corner, Cornall, Gorney, and Gornall.
perhaps a shortened form of   Cornwall   or   Cornish  , or a metathesized form of   Croney  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Cornwall was born about 1354, in Middlesex, England, her father, John Cornwall, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth, was 26. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Henry Frowyk. She died before 4 July 1416, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Cornwall est née environ 1354, à Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Cornwall, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Henry Frowyk. Elle est décédée avant 4 juillet 1416, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Cornwall um 1354 in Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cornwall 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth 26. Sie hatte mit Henry Frowyk mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 4. Juli 1416 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Cornwall è nata il circa 1354 nel Middlesex, England, sua padre, John Cornwall, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Henry Frowyk. Morì prima del 4 luglio 1416, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Cornwallが約1354年にイギリスミッドレセックスで生まれた時，父John Cornwallは31歳，母Elizabethは26歳であった。彼女はHenry Frowykとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1416年7月4日以前にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Cornwall(이)가 대략 1354년 영국 미들레세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cornwall(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Henry Frowyk(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 7월 4일 이전 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Cornwall nasceu aproximadamente 1354, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cornwall, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Henry Frowyk. Ela faleceu antes 4 de julho de 1416, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Cornwall родилась около 1354 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Cornwall было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Henry Frowyk. Она умерла перед 4 июля 1416 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.
